what: Log vault pull event with summary
why: Track sync history for audit and debugging
output: Persisted pull event log entry with sync summary

success_handling.criteria: Pull event is written to event log with complete summary data

error_handling.criteria: Event log write operation throws an error
error_handling.action: Log to stderr as fallback, do not fail the pull operation

event.message: Failed to write pull event log: {error}

decisions.outcome: Pull operation complete with logging warning
